design_philosophy: A modern, warm, and credible school website. Avoids 'tech-bro' aesthetics and generic AI patterns (no purple gradients, no Inter font). It uses a distinct vibrant palette (Navy + Saffron/Amber) to convey authority and youthful energy. Emphasizes spaciousness, large imagery, and readable typography.

font_family.heading: font-sans (Use 'Cabinet Grotesk' or 'Outfit' via Google Fonts/local)

spacing_and_layout.grid_bento: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-8 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-6 md:gap-8
spacing_and_layout.border_radius: rounded-2xl for soft UI elements, rounded-none for brutalist/high-contrast sections

header.style: sticky top-0 z-50 backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#FDFBF7]/80 border-b border-[#E2E8F0]

buttons.primary: inline-flex items-center justify-center px-6 py-3 text-base font-medium text-white bg-[#0F172A] rounded-full hover:bg-[#1E293B] transition-all
buttons.accent: inline-flex items-center justify-center px-6 py-3 text-base font-medium text-white bg-[#EA580C] rounded-full hover:bg-[#C2410C] transition-all
buttons.outline: inline-flex items-center justify-center px-6 py-3 text-base font-medium text-[#0F172A] bg-transparent border-2 border-[#0F172A] rounded-full hover:bg-[#0F172A] hover:text-white transition-all

cards.style: bg-white border border-[#E2E8F0] rounded-2xl overflow-hidden hover:shadow-lg transition-shadow duration-300

admin_panel.th: px-4 py-3 border-b border-[#E2E8F0] text-sm font-semibold text-[#0F172A] bg-[#F8FAFC]
admin_panel.td: px-4 py-3 border-b border-[#E2E8F0] text-sm text-[#475569]

hero_background.description: Happy group of children, used as hero image with an overlay

about_image.description: Young boy sitting at desk in classroom

specific_instructions_for_main_agent: Inject fonts: Add <link href='https://api.fontshare.com/v2/css?f[]=cabinet-grotesk@100,200,300,400,500,700,800,900&display=swap' rel='stylesheet'> and <link href='https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=IBM+Plex+Sans:wght@300;400;500;600;700&display=swap' rel='stylesheet'> to index.html.
Configure tailwind.config.js to map 'sans' to IBM Plex Sans and create a new key 'display' for Cabinet Grotesk. Use font-display for all Headings.
Admission Form: Use Shadcn form components, multi-step structure. Keep styling clean without deep card shadows. Use subtle 1px borders.
Contact Page: Embed a responsive Google Map iframe (can use a generic central location or real one if provided).
Admin Panel: Build an intuitive dashboard with a sidebar. Follow 'Control Room' dense grid design for data.
Add 'data-testid' to all buttons, links, and forms for automated testing.
Do NOT use 'Inter' font or generic purple gradients.
